headline: A Look At CoStar Group (CSGP) Valuation After Raised 2026 Guidance And Homes.com Growth
summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) is back in focus after reporting its 60th straight quarter of double digit revenue growth, doubling adjusted EBITDA year over year, and raising full year 2026 revenue and EBITDA guidance. See our latest analysis for CoStar Group. Despite the upbeat Q1 results and reaffirmed 2026 guidance, CoStar Group’s share price return has been weak, with a 30 day decline of 14.2% and a year to date share price return decline of 47.31%, while the 1 year total shareholder return has...

headline: U.S. hotel construction down for 15 consecutive months; CoStar data shows 136,990 U.S. hotel rooms currently under construction, with luxury segment leading percentage growth at 4.5%.
summary: ARLINGTON, Va. - The volume of U.S. hotel rooms under construction decreased year over year for a 15th consecutive month, according to CoStar's March 2026 data. CoStar is a leading provider of online...

headline: CoStar Data Shows U.K. Hotel RevPAR on an Upward Trajectory
summary: LONDON, May 01, 2026--The U.K. industry posted improved revenue per available room (RevPAR) in March, according to data from CoStar, a global leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information and analytics in the property markets.
